Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.vela

Class FunctionExecutor

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.vela.FunctionExecutor
Direct Known Subclasses:
JavaMethodExecutor, UserDefinedFunctionExecutor
public abstract class FunctionExecutor extends Object
The base class for all function executors. Each subclass must implement apply().

    Do the specified actual parameters conform to the function's formal parameter list? If any operands are converted to a different type, they will be replaced with a new operand in the actual parameter list to prevent side effects.

  • Constructor Details

    • FunctionExecutor

      public FunctionExecutor(Optional<String> funcName, List<String> parameterNames, List<Type> parameterTypes, Optional<Type> returnType, Optional<String> helpString)
      Constructor for functions.
      Parameters:
      funcName - The function's name.
      parameterNames - The function's formal parameter names.
      parameterTypes - The function's parameter types.
      returnType - The function's optional return type.
      helpString - The optional help string.

    • FunctionExecutor

      public FunctionExecutor(Optional<String> funcName, Optional<Type> returnType, Optional<String> helpString)
      Constructor for zero-arity functions.
      Parameters:
      funcName - The function's name.
      returnType - The function's return type.
      helpString - The optional help string.

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public abstract Optional<Operand> apply(List<Operand> operands) throws VeLaEvalError
      Apply the function to the specified operands and return a result of the specified type.
      Parameters:
      operands - A list if operands to which the function is to be applied.
      Returns:
      The optional return value.
      Throws:
      A - VeLaEvalError if an error occurred during function evaluation.
      VeLaEvalError

    • conforms

      public boolean conforms(List<Operand> actualParameters)
      Do the specified actual parameters conform to the function's formal parameter list? If any operands are converted to a different type, they will be replaced with a new operand in the actual parameter list to prevent side effects.
      Parameters:
      actualParameters - A list of actual parameters (Operands).
      Returns:
      Whether or not the actuals conform to the formals.

    • getFuncName

      public Optional<String> getFuncName()
      Returns:
      the funcName
